channel.title: The Wikimedia Foundation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by The Wikimedia Foundation (wikimedia-foundation).

item.title: CVE-2026-14363 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cargo Extension: SQLi in Special:Drilldown
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows SQL Injection. This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: from * before 1.43.9,1.44…

item.title: CVE-2026-14358 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS in Wikimedia Chart pie tooltip via Data:*.tab field title
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Charts Extension allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Mediawiki - Charts Extension: from * bef…

item.title: CVE-2026-58517 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Blocked users can create and edit WikiLambda objects
item.description: Improper neutralization of input terminators vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - WikiLambda Extension allows Authentication Bypass. This issue affects Mediawiki - WikiLambda Extension: from * before 1.43.9,1.44.6,1.45.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-58521 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SQLi in Cargo extension via year range filter
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows SQL Injection. This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: from * before 1.43.9,1.44…

item.title: CVE-2026-58520 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — UrlShortener defaults to ineffective validation open to third-party redirects
item.description: URL redirection to untrusted site ('open redirect') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - UrlShortener Extension allows Cross-Site Flashing. This issue affects Mediawiki - UrlShortener Extension: from * before 1.43.9, 1.44.6, 1.45.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-58025 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Remote Code Execution via Unsafe Deserialization in LogItem Import
item.description: Deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Import/WikiImporter.Php, includes/Import/WikiRevision.Php, includes/Logging/LogEntryBase.Php. This issue a…

item.title: CVE-2026-58029 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Full Account Takeover from BotPasswords and OAuth via action=changeauthenticationdata
item.description: Vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Api/ApiChangeAuthenticationData.Php, includes/Api/ApiLinkAccount.Php, includes/Api/ApiRemoveAuthenticationData.Php, includes/Specials/Specia…

item.title: CVE-2026-58028 — Pretty-printed API output combined with centralauthtoken allows XSS with certain gadgets
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki, Wikimedia Foundation CentralAuth. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Api/ApiFormatB…

item.title: CVE-2026-58026 — $wgNonincludableNamespaces can be bypassed by embedding redirect in other namespaces
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Parser/Parser.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.46.0, 1.45.4, 1.…

item.title: CVE-2026-8857 — Full RCE using EasyTimeline Extension
item.description: A vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation timeline. This vulnerability is associated with program files scripts/EasyTimeline.Pl, includes/Timeline.Php. This issue affects timeline: from * before 1.46.0, 1.45.4, 1.44.6, 1.43.9.

item.title: CVE-2026-58038 — Stored XSS through javascript URLs in SVGs generated by EasyTimeline
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation timeline. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Timeline.Php, scripts/EasyTimeline.Pl. This issue…

item.title: CVE-2026-58027 · 5.3 MEDIUM — QueryAbuseFilter API can be used to see the hit count of private filters, which is hidden in the UI
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation AbuseFilter. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Api/QueryAbuseFilters.Php. This issue affects AbuseFilter: from * before 1.46.0…

item.title: CVE-2026-58030 · 5.3 MEDIUM — SyntaxHighlight stored XSS via unsanitized 'linelinks' attribute
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation SyntaxHighlight_GeSHi. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/SyntaxHighlight.Php. This issue affe…

item.title: CVE-2026-58032 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — mw.Api.getErrorMessage() may return injected HTML if used without errorformat=html
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files resources/src/mediawiki.Api/index.Js. This issue affects…

item.title: CVE-2026-58033 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — "Total number of distinct authors" statistic at action=info does not exclude revisions where the author name was deleted
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Actions/InfoAction.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.46.0, 1.45.…

item.title: CVE-2026-58037 — Core log entries for exceptions and XSS issues in log entry formatting code that may be caused by user-controlled input
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Language/Language.Php, includes/Logging/BlockLog…

item.title: CVE-2026-58036 · 2.1 LOW — Users API leaks whether privileged users have their user groups disabled for lack of 2FA
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Api/ApiQueryAllUsers.Php, includes/Api/ApiQueryUsers.Php, includes/Permissions/Pe…

item.title: CVE-2026-58024 · 5.1 MEDIUM — API identification of users on private wikis
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Api/ApiUserrights.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.46.0, 1.45.4…

item.title: CVE-2026-13707 — Session fixation attacks on improperly configured OAuth 1.0a tools
item.description: Session fixation vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation OAuth. This vulnerability is associated with program files src/Backend/MWOAuthServer.Php. This issue affects OAuth: from * through 1.46.0, 1.45.4, 1.44.6, 1.43.9.

item.title: CVE-2026-13706 — UrlShortener extension url validation can be bypassed due to difference between php url parsing and WHATWG
item.description: Improper input validation vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation UrlShortener. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/UrlShortenerUtils.Php.

item.title: CVE-2026-58031 — Stored i18n XSS in Special:ApiSandbox when a deprecated module is selected
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files resources/src/mediawiki.Special.Apisandbox/ApiSandboxLayo…

item.title: CVE-2026-58034 — Stored XSS through a system message when blocking a temporary account that's related to other temporary accounts
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation CheckUser. This vulnerability is associated with program files modules/ext.CheckUser.TempAccounts/components/blockConnec…

item.title: CVE-2026-58035 — Stored XSS through a system message in the codex version of Special:Block
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files resources/src/mediawiki.Special.Block/SpecialBlock.Vue.

item.title: CVE-2026-58519 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS through Cargo's map format
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: from * before 3.9.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-58518 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - RedirectManager Extension allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects Mediawiki - RedirectManager Extension: from * before 1.3.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-5266 · 2.3 LOW
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Echo. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Api/ApiEchoNotifications.Php. This issue affects Echo: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1…

item.title: CVE-2026-34095 — action=raw with Special:Mypage subpage title responds with "Content-Type: text/html" on ctype=text/javascript request
item.description: Vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Actions/ActionEntryPoint.Php, includes/Request/FauxResponse.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34094 · 2 LOW — Customized help link for page protection indicator is relative to subpage name, because the link target is missing the "/wiki/" prefix
item.description: Vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Page/Article.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34093 · 1.1 LOW — Special:UserRights allows viewing user rights from private wiki
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Specials/SpecialUserRights.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.43.…

item.title: CVE-2026-34092 · 2.1 LOW — Block UI elements in 'tools'-sidebar shows presence of an autoblocked IP
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Skin/Skin.Php. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2…

item.title: CVE-2026-34091 · 5.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — User localization leaked by AbuseFilter + EventStream
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34090 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Suggested investigations: Handle suppressed usernames
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation CheckUser. This issue affects CheckUser: from 1.45.0 before 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34089 · 2.3 LOW — Memory leak in Scribunto causes runJobs.php to run out of memory
item.description: Vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Scribunto. This issue affects Scribunto: from 1.45.0 before 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34088 · 1.3 LOW 🌩️ — RecentChanges entries expose suppressed content via generated log page html
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This issue affects MediaWiki: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34087 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Users API leaks whether privileged users have their user groups disabled for lack of 2FA
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation OATHAuth. This issue affects OATHAuth: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-34086 · 2.1 LOW — AbuseFilter misuses ::userCanBitfield, exposing access-controlled information
item.description: Vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation AbuseFilter. This issue affects AbuseFilter: from * before 1.43.7, 1.44.4, 1.45.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-39936 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS in Score due to usage of non-reserved data attributes
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Score Extension allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The issue has been remediated on the `master` branch, and in…

item.title: CVE-2026-39935 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — XSS-via-i18n in localised wiki names
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - CampaignEvents Extension allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue was remediated only on the `master` bran…

item.title: CVE-2026-39934 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Growth Experiments ReassignMenteesJob runs as an infinite loop
item.description: Loop with unreachable exit condition ('infinite loop') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - GrowthExperiments Extension allows Leveraging Time-of-Check and Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) Race Conditions. This issue was remediated only on the `…

item.title: CVE-2026-39933 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Multiple XSS vulnerabilities in GlobalWatchlist
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - GlobalWatchlist Extension allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The issue has been remediated on the `master` bran…

item.title: CVE-2026-39937 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Global vanishing does not completely remove user email
item.description: Improper removal of sensitive information before storage or transfer vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - CentralAuth Extension allows Resource Leak Exposure. The issue has been remediated on the `master` branch, and in the release b…

item.title: CVE-2026-39837 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS through the dynamic table format in Cargo
item.description: Improper neutralization of Script-Related HTML tags in a web page (basic XSS) vulnerability in WikiWorks Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: before 3.8.7.

item.title: CVE-2026-39841 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS through list fields on Cargo's page values and Special:CargoTables
item.description: Improper neutralization of Script-Related HTML tags in a web page (basic XSS) vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: before 3.8.7.

item.title: CVE-2026-39840 · 5.1 MEDIUM — CSS injection in multiple Cargo display formats
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows XSS Targeting Non-Script Elements.This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: before 3.8…

item.title: CVE-2026-39839 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS through URLs in Cargo's map format
item.description: Improper neutralization of Script-Related HTML tags in a web page (basic XSS) vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Cargo Extension allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Mediawiki - Cargo Extension: before 3.8.7.

item.title: CVE-2026-39838 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ProofreadPage improperly sanitizes multiline styles using Sanitizer::checkCSS
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki - ProofreadPage Extension allows XSS Targeting Non-Script Elements. The issue has been remediated on the `master` bra…

item.title: CVE-2026-5762 · 5.3 MEDIUM — ReportIncident DiscussionTools integration causes slow requests
item.description: Allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki - ReportIncident Extension allows HTTP DoS. This issue was remediated only on the `master` branch.

item.title: CVE-2026-22711 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS through system messages in WikiLove
item.description: Improper neutralization of alternate XSS syntax vulnerability in The Wikimedia Foundation Mediawiki - Wikilove Extension allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).The issue has been remediated on the `master` branch, and in the release branches for MediaWiki…

item.title: CVE-2025-67481 — mw.message(…).parse() doesn't output safe HTML, but it's being used as if it does
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki. This vulnerability is associated with program files resources/src/mediawiki.JqueryMsg/mediawiki.JqueryMsg.Js.…

item.title: CVE-2025-67482 · 1.7 LOW 🌩️ — Lua segfault in unpack()
item.description: Vulnerability in Wikimedia Foundation Scribunto, Wikimedia Foundation luasandbox. This vulnerability is associated with program files includes/Engines/LuaCommon/lualib/mwInit.Lua, library.C. This issue affects Scribunto: from * before 1.39.16, 1.43.6…
